Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class UserManagementSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.UserManagementSettings2
public class UserManagementSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for UserManagementSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="UserManagementSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCanAnswerContainUsernameEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsConcealPersonalInfoEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsContactlessExternalIdentityUsersEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEnhancedConcealPersonalInfoEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEnhancedPermsetMgmtEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEnhancedProfileMgmtEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsNewProfileUiEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsProfileFilteringEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRestrictEmailDomainsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsScrambleUserDataEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsUserSelfDeactivateEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}UserManagementSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PermsetsInFieldCreation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PsaExpirationUiEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RestrictedProfileCloning" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserAccessPoliciesEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
